---
title: "Sri Lanka Dengue Surveillance Dashboard"
format:
  dashboard:
    theme: cosmo
editor: source
---

```{r}
#| label: load-packages
#| message: false
#| warning: false

library(dplyr)
library(lubridate)
library(ISOweek)
library(zoo)
library(plotly)
library(scales)
library(DT)
library(denguedatahub)
library(e1071)
library(sf)
library(geodata)
library(leaflet)
library(forecast)
```

```{r}
#| label: prepare-data
#| message: false
#| warning: false

data("srilanka_weekly_data")

#------------ Cleaning the data set----------------------
dengue_clean <- srilanka_weekly_data |>
  mutate(
    year  = as.integer(year),
    week  = as.integer(week),
    cases = as.integer(cases),
    date  = ISOweek2date(paste0(year, "-W", sprintf("%02d", week), "-1"))
  ) |>
  filter(!is.na(date), !is.na(cases))

# -----National weekly totals---------------------------------
national_weekly <- dengue_clean |>
  group_by(year, week, date) |>
  summarise(cases = sum(cases, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") |>
  arrange(date)

# Outbreak threshold: Mean + 2 × SD
outbreak_mean      <- mean(national_weekly$cases)
outbreak_sd        <- sd(national_weekly$cases)
outbreak_threshold <- outbreak_mean + 2 * outbreak_sd

national_weekly <- national_weekly |>
  mutate(
    MA12_week   = rollmean(cases, k = 12, fill = NA, align = "right"),
    is_outbreak = cases > outbreak_threshold
  )

outbreak_weeks <- national_weekly |> filter(is_outbreak)

#------------ Annual totals-------------------------------
annual_cases <- dengue_clean |>
  group_by(year) |>
  summarise(cases = sum(cases, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

#------------ District totals-----------------------------
district_summary <- dengue_clean |>
  group_by(district) |>
  summarise(total_cases = sum(cases, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") |>
  arrange(desc(total_cases))

district_year <- dengue_clean |>
  group_by(district, year) |>
  summarise(cases = sum(cases, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

#-------------Seasonality-------------------------------------
monthly_pattern <- dengue_clean |>
  mutate(
    month_num  = month(date),
    month_name = factor(month(date, label = TRUE, abbr = TRUE),
                        levels = month(1:12, label = TRUE, abbr = TRUE))
  ) |>
  group_by(month_num, month_name) |>
  summarise(avg_cases = mean(cases, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") |>
  arrange(month_num)

monthly_box <- national_weekly |>
  mutate(
    month_num  = month(date),
    month_name = factor(month(date, label = TRUE, abbr = TRUE),
                        levels = month(1:12, label = TRUE, abbr = TRUE))
  )

# ── STL decomposition (monthly national) ─────────────────────────────────────
monthly_national <- dengue_clean |>
  mutate(month_floor = floor_date(date, "month")) |>
  group_by(month_floor) |>
  summarise(cases = sum(cases, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") |>
  arrange(month_floor)

ts_dengue  <- ts(monthly_national$cases, frequency = 12,
                 start = c(year(min(monthly_national$month_floor)),
                            month(min(monthly_national$month_floor))))
stl_result <- stl(ts_dengue, s.window = "periodic", robust = TRUE)
stl_df <- data.frame(
  date      = monthly_national$month_floor,
  observed  = as.numeric(stl_result$time.series[,"seasonal"] +
                         stl_result$time.series[,"trend"]    +
                         stl_result$time.series[,"remainder"]),
  trend     = as.numeric(stl_result$time.series[,"trend"]),
  seasonal  = as.numeric(stl_result$time.series[,"seasonal"]),
  remainder = as.numeric(stl_result$time.series[,"remainder"])
)

# --- District boundaries for the map (GADM level 1 = Sri Lanka districts)-------
lk_districts_raw <- geodata::gadm(country = "LKA", level = 1, path = tempdir()) |>
  sf::st_as_sf()


name_fix <- c(
  "Moneragala" = "Monaragala"
)

lk_districts <- lk_districts_raw |>
  mutate(district = dplyr::recode(NAME_1, !!!name_fix, .default = NAME_1))

map_data <- lk_districts |>
  left_join(district_summary, by = "district") |>
  mutate(pct = round(total_cases / sum(total_cases, na.rm = TRUE) * 100, 1))

# --- Forecast: multi-year-ahead ARIMA on national monthly cases------

fc_horizon <- 60

fit_arima  <- forecast::auto.arima(ts_dengue)
fc         <- forecast::forecast(fit_arima, h = fc_horizon)
arima_ord  <- forecast::arimaorder(fit_arima)

fc_df <- data.frame(
  date  = seq(max(monthly_national$month_floor) %m+% months(1),
              by = "month", length.out = fc_horizon),
  point = as.numeric(fc$mean),
  lo80  = as.numeric(fc$lower[, 1]),
  hi80  = as.numeric(fc$upper[, 1]),
  lo95  = as.numeric(fc$lower[, 2]),
  hi95  = as.numeric(fc$upper[, 2])
) |>
  mutate(year = year(date), month_num = month(date))

# Annual aggregation 
hist_annual_mean <- round(mean(annual_cases$cases))

annual_forecast <- fc_df |>
  group_by(year) |>
  summarise(
    n_months = n(),
    point    = sum(point),
    lo80     = sum(lo80),
    hi80     = sum(hi80),
    lo95     = sum(lo95),
    hi95     = sum(hi95),
    .groups  = "drop"
  ) |>
  filter(n_months == 12) |>
  arrange(year) |>
  mutate(hist_mean = hist_annual_mean)

#--- Hand the forecast data to Observable JS for the interactive year picker -----------------------------------
fc_monthly_ojs <- fc_df |> mutate(date = as.character(date))

ojs_define(fc_monthly_r = fc_monthly_ojs, fc_annual_r = annual_forecast)

# ----------------KPIs---------------------------------------
total_cases      <- sum(dengue_clean$cases, na.rm = TRUE)
peak_year        <- annual_cases |> slice_max(cases, n = 1) |> pull(year)
peak_cases       <- annual_cases |> slice_max(cases, n = 1) |> pull(cases)
top_district     <- district_summary$district[1]
n_outbreak_weeks <- sum(national_weekly$is_outbreak, na.rm = TRUE)

#---- Descriptive stats (for compact card)------------------
desc_mean   <- round(outbreak_mean, 1)
desc_median <- median(national_weekly$cases)
desc_sd     <- round(outbreak_sd, 1)
desc_skew   <- round(e1071::skewness(national_weekly$cases), 2)
desc_kurt   <- round(e1071::kurtosis(national_weekly$cases), 2)

#---------- Colour palette---------------------------------
TEAL  <- "#0D6E6E"
NAVY  <- "#1A5276"
RED   <- "#A93226"
GREEN <- "#117A65"
LIGHT <- "#A8D5CF"
top5_colours <- c("#0D6E6E","#1A5276","#A93226","#B7950B","#117A65")
top5_districts <- district_summary$district[1:5]
top5_trend <- district_year |> filter(district %in% top5_districts)
```

# Overview

## Row {height="18%"}

```{r}
#| content: valuebox
#| title: "Total Cases (2006 - 2025)"
list(icon = "bug-fill", color = "teal",
     value = format(total_cases, big.mark = ","))
```

```{r}
#| content: valuebox
#| title: "Peak Epidemic Year"
list(icon = "exclamation-triangle-fill", color = "danger",
     value = paste0(peak_year, "  (", format(peak_cases, big.mark = ","), ")"))
```

```{r}
#| content: valuebox
#| title: "Highest Burden District"
list(icon = "geo-alt-fill", color = "primary",
     value = top_district)
```

```{r}
#| content: valuebox
#| title: "Detected Outbreak Weeks"
list(icon = "exclamation-octagon-fill", color = "warning",
     value = n_outbreak_weeks)
```

## Row {height="82%"}

```{r}
#| title: "Descriptive Statistics of National Weekly Cases"

htmltools::div(
  style = "padding: 0.8rem 1rem; font-size: 0.92rem; line-height: 2;",
  htmltools::tags$table(
    style = "width:100%; border-collapse:collapse;",
    htmltools::tags$thead(
      htmltools::tags$tr(
        htmltools::tags$th(style="text-align:left; border-bottom:2px solid #0D6E6E; padding:4px 8px; color:#0D6E6E;", "Statistic"),
        htmltools::tags$th(style="text-align:right; border-bottom:2px solid #0D6E6E; padding:4px 8px; color:#0D6E6E;", "Value")
      )
    ),
    htmltools::tags$tbody(
      htmltools::tags$tr(style="background:#f8f9fa;",
        htmltools::tags$td(style="padding:5px 8px;", "Mean"),
        htmltools::tags$td(style="padding:5px 8px; text-align:right; font-weight:600;", format(desc_mean, big.mark=","))
      ),
      htmltools::tags$tr(
        htmltools::tags$td(style="padding:5px 8px;", "Median"),
        htmltools::tags$td(style="padding:5px 8px; text-align:right; font-weight:600;", format(desc_median, big.mark=","))
      ),
      htmltools::tags$tr(style="background:#f8f9fa;",
        htmltools::tags$td(style="padding:5px 8px;", "Std Deviation"),
        htmltools::tags$td(style="padding:5px 8px; text-align:right; font-weight:600;", format(desc_sd, big.mark=","))
      ),
      htmltools::tags$tr(
        htmltools::tags$td(style="padding:5px 8px;", "Minimum"),
        htmltools::tags$td(style="padding:5px 8px; text-align:right; font-weight:600;", "0")
      ),
      htmltools::tags$tr(style="background:#f8f9fa;",
        htmltools::tags$td(style="padding:5px 8px;", "Maximum"),
        htmltools::tags$td(style="padding:5px 8px; text-align:right; font-weight:600;", format(max(national_weekly$cases), big.mark=","))
      ),
      htmltools::tags$tr(
        htmltools::tags$td(style="padding:5px 8px;", "Skewness"),
        htmltools::tags$td(style="padding:5px 8px; text-align:right; font-weight:600;", desc_skew)
      ),
      htmltools::tags$tr(style="background:#f8f9fa;",
        htmltools::tags$td(style="padding:5px 8px;", "Kurtosis"),
        htmltools::tags$td(style="padding:5px 8px; text-align:right; font-weight:600;", desc_kurt)
      ),
      htmltools::tags$tr(
        htmltools::tags$td(style="padding:5px 8px;", "Outbreak Threshold"),
        htmltools::tags$td(style="padding:5px 8px; text-align:right; font-weight:600; color:#A93226;",
          paste0(round(outbreak_threshold, 0), " (Mean + 2·SD)"))
      )
    )
  ),
  htmltools::p(style="font-size:0.78rem; color:#666; margin-top:0.8rem;",
    "Based on ", format(nrow(national_weekly), big.mark=","),
    " national weekly observations, 2006 - 2025.")
)
```

# Trends and Outbreaks

## Row {height="50%"}

### Column {width="55%"}

```{r}
#| title: "Annual Dengue Cases (click a bar to highlight that year)"

annual_cases_plot <- annual_cases |>
  mutate(
    color = ifelse(year == peak_year,TEAL, TEAL),
    label = ifelse(year == peak_year,
                   paste0("<b>", format(cases, big.mark=","), "</b>"),
                   "")
  )

plot_ly(
  data          = annual_cases_plot,
  x             = ~year,
  y             = ~cases,
  type          = "bar",
  marker        = list(color = ~color, opacity = 0.88),
  text          = ~label,
  textposition  = "outside",
  hovertemplate = "<b>%{x}</b>: %{y:,} cases<extra></extra>"
) |>
  layout(
    xaxis  = list(title = "Year", dtick = 2),
    yaxis  = list(title = "Annual Cases", tickformat = ","),
    margin = list(t = 30, b = 10)
  ) |>
  config(displayModeBar = FALSE)
```

### Column {width="45%"}

```{r}
#| title: "Annual Trend of Top 5 Districts"

p <- plot_ly()
for (i in seq_along(top5_districts)) {
  d <- top5_trend |> filter(district == top5_districts[i])
  p <- p |> add_trace(
    data = d, x = ~year, y = ~cases,
    type = "scatter", mode = "lines+markers",
    name = top5_districts[i],
    line   = list(color = top5_colours[i], width = 2),
    marker = list(color = top5_colours[i], size = 5),
    hovertemplate = paste0("<b>", top5_districts[i], "</b> %{x}: %{y:,}<extra></extra>")
  )
}
p |>
  layout(
    xaxis     = list(title = "Year", dtick = 2),
    yaxis     = list(title = "Annual Cases", tickformat = ","),
    legend    = list(orientation = "h", y = -0.22),
    hovermode = "x unified",
    margin    = list(t = 10, b = 60)
  ) |>
  config(displayModeBar = FALSE)
```

## Row {height="50%"}

```{r}
#| title: "National Weekly Cases with Outbreak Detection"

plot_ly() |>
  add_trace(
    data          = national_weekly,
    x             = ~date, y = ~cases,
    type          = "scatter", mode = "lines",
    line          = list(color = "rgba(13,110,110,0.4)", width = 1),
    fill          = "tozeroy", fillcolor = "rgba(13,110,110,0.08)",
    name          = "Weekly Cases",
    hovertemplate = "%{x|%d %b %Y}: <b>%{y:,}</b><extra></extra>"
  ) |>
  add_trace(
    data          = national_weekly,
    x             = ~date, y = ~MA12_week,
    type          = "scatter", mode = "lines",
    line          = list(color = NAVY, width = 2, dash = "dot"),
    name          = "12-Week MA",
    hovertemplate = "%{x|%b %Y} MA: <b>%{y:,.0f}</b><extra></extra>"
  ) |>
  add_trace(
    x         = range(national_weekly$date),
    y         = c(outbreak_threshold, outbreak_threshold),
    type      = "scatter", mode = "lines",
    line      = list(color = RED, width = 1.5, dash = "dash"),
    name      = paste0("Threshold (", round(outbreak_threshold), ")"),
    hoverinfo = "skip"
  ) |>
  add_trace(
    data          = outbreak_weeks,
    x             = ~date, y = ~cases,
    type          = "scatter", mode = "markers",
    marker        = list(color = RED, size = 7,
                         line = list(color = "white", width = 1)),
    name          = "Outbreak Week",
    hovertemplate = "<b>⚠ OUTBREAK</b><br>%{x|%d %b %Y}<br>%{y:,} cases<extra></extra>"
  ) |>
  layout(
    xaxis     = list(title = "", tickformat = "%Y",
                     rangeslider = list(visible = TRUE, thickness = 0.06)),
    yaxis     = list(title = "National Weekly Cases", tickformat = ","),
    legend    = list(orientation = "h", y = -0.25),
    hovermode = "x unified",
    margin    = list(t = 10, b = 70)
  ) |>
  config(displayModeBar = FALSE)
```

# Seasonality

## Row {height="45%"}

### Column {width="38%"}

```{r}
#| title: "Average Weekly Cases by Month"

plot_ly(
  data          = monthly_pattern,
  x             = ~month_name,
  y             = ~avg_cases,
  type          = "bar",
  marker        = list(
    color   = ~avg_cases,
    colorscale = list(c(0, LIGHT), c(1, TEAL)),
    showscale  = FALSE
  ),
  text          = ~round(avg_cases, 0),
  textposition  = "outside",
  hovertemplate = "<b>%{x}</b>: %{y:.0f} avg cases<extra></extra>"
) |>
  layout(
    xaxis  = list(title = ""),
    yaxis  = list(title = "Avg Weekly Cases"),
    margin = list(t = 10, b = 10)
  ) |>
  config(displayModeBar = FALSE)
```

### Column {width="62%"}

```{r}
#| title: "Monthly Distribution of Cases"

plot_ly(
  data          = monthly_box,
  x             = ~month_name,
  y             = ~cases,
  type          = "box",
  fillcolor     = "rgba(168,213,207,0.45)",
  line          = list(color = TEAL),
  marker        = list(color = RED, size = 3, opacity = 0.55),
  hovertemplate = "<b>%{x}</b><br>Median: %{median:,}<br>Q1: %{q1:,} · Q3: %{q3:,}<extra></extra>"
) |>
  layout(
    xaxis      = list(title = ""),
    yaxis      = list(title = "National Weekly Cases", tickformat = ","),
    showlegend = FALSE,
    margin     = list(t = 10)
  ) |>
  config(displayModeBar = FALSE)
```

## Row {height="55%"}

```{r}
#| title: "STL Decomposition (drag to zoom)"

p_obs <- plot_ly(data = stl_df, x = ~date, y = ~observed,
                 type = "scatter", mode = "lines",
                 line = list(color = TEAL, width = 1.5), name = "Observed",
                 hovertemplate = "%{x|%b %Y}: <b>%{y:,}</b><extra></extra>") |>
  layout(yaxis = list(title = "Observed", tickformat = ","),
         xaxis = list(showticklabels = FALSE))

p_trend <- plot_ly(data = stl_df, x = ~date, y = ~trend,
                   type = "scatter", mode = "lines",
                   line = list(color = NAVY, width = 2), name = "Trend",
                   hovertemplate = "%{x|%b %Y}: <b>%{y:,.0f}</b><extra></extra>") |>
  layout(yaxis = list(title = "Trend", tickformat = ","),
         xaxis = list(showticklabels = FALSE))

p_seasonal <- plot_ly(data = stl_df, x = ~date, y = ~seasonal,
                      type = "scatter", mode = "lines",
                      line = list(color = GREEN, width = 1.5), name = "Seasonal",
                      hovertemplate = "%{x|%b %Y}: <b>%{y:,.0f}</b><extra></extra>") |>
  layout(yaxis = list(title = "Seasonal", tickformat = ","),
         xaxis = list(showticklabels = FALSE))

p_remainder <- plot_ly(data = stl_df, x = ~date, y = ~remainder,
                       type = "scatter", mode = "lines+markers",
                       line   = list(color = RED, width = 1),
                       marker = list(color = RED, size = 2),
                       name   = "Remainder",
                       hovertemplate = "%{x|%b %Y}: <b>%{y:,.0f}</b><extra></extra>") |>
  layout(yaxis = list(title = "Remainder", tickformat = ","),
         xaxis = list(title = "Year", tickformat = "%Y"))

subplot(p_obs, p_trend, p_seasonal, p_remainder,
        nrows = 4, shareX = TRUE, titleY = TRUE,
        heights = c(0.30, 0.27, 0.22, 0.21)) |>
  layout(
    hovermode = "x unified",
    legend    = list(orientation = "h", y = -0.06),
    margin    = list(t = 10, l = 75, b = 45)
  ) |>
  config(displayModeBar = FALSE)
```

# Districts

## Row {height="100%"}

### Column {width="42%"}

```{r}
#| title: "Total Cases per District (2006 - 2025)"

district_pct <- district_summary |>
  mutate(pct = round(total_cases / sum(total_cases) * 100, 1))

plot_ly(
  data          = district_pct |>
                    mutate(district = reorder(district, total_cases)),
  x             = ~total_cases,
  y             = ~district,
  type          = "bar",
  orientation   = "h",
  marker        = list(
    color        = ~total_cases,
    colorscale   = list(c(0, LIGHT), c(1, TEAL)),
    showscale    = FALSE
  ),
  text          = ~paste0(scales::comma(total_cases), "  (", pct, "%)"),
  textposition  = "outside",
  hovertemplate = "<b>%{y}</b><br>%{x:,} cases · %{text}<extra></extra>"
) |>
  layout(
    xaxis  = list(title = "Total Cases", tickformat = ","),
    yaxis  = list(title = ""),
    height = 580,
    margin = list(t = 10, r = 140)
  ) |>
  config(displayModeBar = FALSE)
```

### Column {width="58%"}

```{r}
#| title: "District × Year Heatmap"

dh <- district_year |>
  mutate(district = factor(district, levels = district_summary$district))

plot_ly(
  data          = dh,
  x             = ~year,
  y             = ~district,
  z             = ~cases,
  type          = "heatmap",
  colorscale    = list(c(0,"#E8F8F5"), c(0.5, TEAL), c(1, RED)),
  colorbar      = list(title = "Cases", tickformat = ","),
  hovertemplate = "<b>%{y}</b> · %{x}<br>Cases: <b>%{z:,}</b><extra></extra>"
) |>
  layout(
    xaxis  = list(title = "Year", dtick = 2),
    yaxis  = list(title = "", autorange = "reversed"),
    height = 580,
    margin = list(t = 10, l = 100)
  ) |>
  config(displayModeBar = FALSE)
```

# Map

## Row {height="100%"}

```{r}
#| title: "Total Dengue Cases by District, Sri Lanka (2006 - 2025)"

pal <- leaflet::colorNumeric(
  palette = c(LIGHT, TEAL, RED),
  domain  = map_data$total_cases
)

leaflet::leaflet(map_data) |>
  leaflet::addProviderTiles("CartoDB.Positron") |>
  leaflet::addPolygons(
    fillColor    = ~pal(total_cases),
    fillOpacity  = 0.82,
    color        = "white",
    weight       = 1,
    label        = ~paste0(district, ": ", format(total_cases, big.mark = ","),
                            " cases (", pct, "%)"),
    highlightOptions = leaflet::highlightOptions(
      weight = 2, color = "#333", bringToFront = TRUE
    )
  ) |>
  leaflet::addLegend(
    pal      = pal,
    values   = ~total_cases,
    title    = "Total Cases",
    position = "bottomright"
  )
```

# Forecasting

## Row {height="12%"}

```{ojs}
//| title: "Choose a year to forecast"

fc_annual = transpose(fc_annual_r)

viewof selected_year = Inputs.select(
  fc_annual.map(d => d.year),
  {
    label: "Year",
    value: fc_annual[0].year
  }
)
```

## Row {height="23%"}

```{ojs}
//| title: "Forecasted Total Cases"

selected = fc_annual.find(d => d.year === selected_year)

html`<div style="text-align:center; padding-top:0.6rem;">
  <div style="font-size:2rem; font-weight:700; color:#0D6E6E;">
    ${selected.point.toLocaleString(undefined, {maximumFractionDigits: 0})}
  </div>
  <div style="font-size:0.8rem; color:#666;">
    95% CI: ${selected.lo95.toLocaleString(undefined, {maximumFractionDigits: 0})}
    &ndash; ${selected.hi95.toLocaleString(undefined, {maximumFractionDigits: 0})}
  </div>
</div>`
```

```{ojs}
//| title: "Historical Annual Average"

delta_pct = ((selected.point - selected.hist_mean) / selected.hist_mean) * 100

html`<div style="text-align:center; padding-top:0.6rem;">
  <div style="font-size:2rem; font-weight:700; color:${delta_pct >= 0 ? "#A93226" : "#117A65"};">
    ${delta_pct >= 0 ? "+" : ""}${delta_pct.toFixed(1)}%
  </div>
  <div style="font-size:0.8rem; color:#666;">
    Historical average: ${selected.hist_mean.toLocaleString()} cases/year
  </div>
</div>`
```

```{ojs}
//| title: "Outbreak Risk Signal"

risk = delta_pct > 50 ? "High" : (delta_pct > 0 ? "Moderate" : "Low")
risk_colour = risk === "High" ? "#A93226" : (risk === "Moderate" ? "#B7950B" : "#117A65")

html`<div style="text-align:center; padding-top:0.6rem;">
  <div style="font-size:2rem; font-weight:700; color:${risk_colour};">
    ${risk}
  </div>
  <div style="font-size:0.8rem; color:#666;">
    Relative to the 2006&ndash;2025 annual average
  </div>
</div>`
```

## Row {height="65%"}

### Column {width="45%"}

```{ojs}
//| title: "Monthly Forecast for the Selected Year"

fc_monthly = transpose(fc_monthly_r).map(d => ({...d, date: new Date(d.date)}))

monthly_selected = fc_monthly.filter(d => d.year === selected_year)

Plot.plot({
  width: 480,
  height: 340,
  marginLeft: 60,
  y: {label: "Forecasted Monthly Cases", grid: true},
  x: {label: null, type: "utc", tickFormat: "%b"},
  marks: [
    Plot.areaY(monthly_selected, {x: "date", y1: "lo95", y2: "hi95", fill: "#A93226", fillOpacity: 0.15}),
    Plot.areaY(monthly_selected, {x: "date", y1: "lo80", y2: "hi80", fill: "#A93226", fillOpacity: 0.30}),
    Plot.line(monthly_selected, {x: "date", y: "point", stroke: "#A93226", strokeWidth: 2}),
    Plot.dot(monthly_selected, {x: "date", y: "point", fill: "#A93226", r: 3}),
    Plot.ruleY([0])
  ]
})
```

### Column {width="55%"}

```{r}
#| title: "Full Forecast Overview  (ARIMA)"

plot_ly() |>
  add_trace(
    data = monthly_national, x = ~month_floor, y = ~cases,
    type = "scatter", mode = "lines",
    line = list(color = TEAL, width = 1.5), name = "Observed",
    hovertemplate = "%{x|%b %Y}: <b>%{y:,}</b><extra></extra>"
  ) |>
  add_trace(
    data = fc_df, x = ~date, y = ~hi95,
    type = "scatter", mode = "lines",
    line = list(width = 0), showlegend = FALSE, hoverinfo = "skip"
  ) |>
  add_trace(
    data = fc_df, x = ~date, y = ~lo95,
    type = "scatter", mode = "lines",
    fill = "tonexty", fillcolor = "rgba(169,50,38,0.15)",
    line = list(width = 0), name = "95% CI", hoverinfo = "skip"
  ) |>
  add_trace(
    data = fc_df, x = ~date, y = ~hi80,
    type = "scatter", mode = "lines",
    line = list(width = 0), showlegend = FALSE, hoverinfo = "skip"
  ) |>
  add_trace(
    data = fc_df, x = ~date, y = ~lo80,
    type = "scatter", mode = "lines",
    fill = "tonexty", fillcolor = "rgba(169,50,38,0.30)",
    line = list(width = 0), name = "80% CI", hoverinfo = "skip"
  ) |>
  add_trace(
    data = fc_df, x = ~date, y = ~point,
    type = "scatter", mode = "lines",
    line = list(color = RED, width = 2, dash = "dash"), name = "Forecast",
    hovertemplate = "%{x|%b %Y} forecast: <b>%{y:,.0f}</b><extra></extra>"
  ) |>
  layout(
    xaxis     = list(title = "", tickformat = "%Y"),
    yaxis     = list(title = "Monthly Cases", tickformat = ","),
    legend    = list(orientation = "h", y = -0.15),
    hovermode = "x unified",
    margin    = list(t = 10, b = 40),
    annotations = list(
      x = 0, y = 1.08, xref = "paper", yref = "paper", showarrow = FALSE,
      text = paste0("Model: ARIMA(", paste(arima_ord[1:3], collapse = ","), ")"),
      font = list(size = 11, color = "#666")
    )
  ) |>
  config(displayModeBar = FALSE)
```

# Data Explorer

## Row

```{r}
#| title: "Weekly District-Level Dataset - filter any column, sort, search"

dengue_clean |>
  select(Year = year, Week = week, Date = date, District = district, Cases = cases) |>
  arrange(desc(Year), desc(Week)) |>
  DT::datatable(
    filter   = "top",
    rownames = FALSE,
    extensions = "Buttons",
    options  = list(
      pageLength = 25,
      scrollX    = TRUE,
      dom        = "Bfrtip",
      buttons    = list("csv", "excel")
    )
  )
```

# About

## Row

### Column {width="58%"}

```{r}
htmltools::div(
  style = "padding:1rem 1.2rem; line-height:1.9; font-size:.93rem;",

  htmltools::h4("Sri Lanka Dengue Surveillance Dashboard"),
  htmltools::p(
    "Weekly dengue case data for all ", htmltools::strong("26 districts"),
    " of Sri Lanka, covering ", htmltools::strong("2006 - 2025"),
    ". Source: ", htmltools::code("denguedatahub"),
    " R package (Talagala T.S., CRAN 2024), derived from the ",
    htmltools::em("Weekly Epidemiological Reports"),
    " of the Epidemiology Unit, Ministry of Health, Sri Lanka."
  ),

  htmltools::h5("Dashboard tabs"),
  htmltools::tags$ul(
    htmltools::tags$li(htmltools::strong("Overview - "),
      "4 KPI cards and descriptive statistics table of national weekly cases."),
    htmltools::tags$li(htmltools::strong("Trends and Outbreaks - "),
      "Annual bar chart, top-5 district trends, weekly time series with statistical outbreak detection (threshold = Mean + 2×SD) and interactive range slider."),
    htmltools::tags$li(htmltools::strong("Seasonality - "),
      "Average monthly bar, monthly case distribution box plot, STL decomposition (Observed / Trend / Seasonal / Remainder)."),
    htmltools::tags$li(htmltools::strong("Districts - "),
      "All-district ranked bar with % share labels, district × year heatmap with diverging colour scale."),
    htmltools::tags$li(htmltools::strong("Map - "),
      "Interactive choropleth of Sri Lanka showing total dengue cases by district."),
    htmltools::tags$li(htmltools::strong("Forecasting - "),
      "Interactive year picker (2026-2031) showing the ARIMA-forecasted annual case total, its 95% prediction interval, an outbreak-risk signal versus the 2006-2025 historical average, a monthly breakdown chart for the chosen year, and a full multi-year forecast overview with 80%/95% confidence bands."),
    htmltools::tags$li(htmltools::strong("Data Explorer - "),
      "Full filterable weekly dataset with CSV / Excel export buttons."),
  
  ),

  htmltools::h5("Key findings"),
  htmltools::tags$ul(
    htmltools::tags$li(htmltools::strong("2017"), " was an unprecedented epidemic - over 174,000 national cases."),
    htmltools::tags$li(htmltools::strong("Colombo"), " is the highest-burden district (~174 K cumulative cases), reflecting high density and urbanisation."),
    htmltools::tags$li("Primary transmission peak: ", htmltools::strong("June - July"), " (south-west monsoon)."),
    htmltools::tags$li("Secondary peak: ", htmltools::strong("November - December"), " (north-east monsoon transition)."),
    htmltools::tags$li("STL decomposition confirms a ", htmltools::strong("strong annual seasonal cycle"), " throughout the study period.")
  ),

  htmltools::h5("Methods"),
  htmltools::tags$ul(
    htmltools::tags$li("ISO year-week → date conversion via ",
      htmltools::code("ISOweek::ISOweek2date()"), "."),
    htmltools::tags$li("12-period rolling mean: ", htmltools::code("zoo::rollmean(k = 12, align = 'right')"), "."),
    htmltools::tags$li("Outbreak threshold: ", htmltools::em("Mean + 2 × SD"), " of national weekly totals."),
    htmltools::tags$li("STL: ", htmltools::code("stats::stl(s.window='periodic', robust=TRUE)"),
      " on monthly national aggregates."),
    htmltools::tags$li("District boundaries: ", htmltools::code("geodata::gadm('LKA', level = 1)"),
      " (GADM administrative boundaries)."),
    htmltools::tags$li("Forecast: ", htmltools::code("forecast::auto.arima()"),
      " fitted to monthly national totals, 60-month (5-year) horizon, 80%/95% prediction intervals; annual totals shown for years with a complete 12-month forecast."),
    htmltools::tags$li("Forecasting tab interactivity implemented client-side with ",
      htmltools::code("ojs_define()"), " and Observable JS ", htmltools::code("Inputs.select()"), ".")
  ),

  htmltools::hr(),
  htmltools::p(style="font-size:.82rem; color:#555;",
    htmltools::em("Talagala T.S. et al. (2024). denguedatahub. CRAN v2.1.1. | Dashboard: AS2022523"))
)
```

### Column {width="42%"}

```{r}
htmltools::div(
  style = "padding:1rem 1.2rem;",
  htmltools::h5("All 26 Districts"),
  htmltools::tags$ul(
    style = "column-count:2; font-size:.9rem; line-height:2.1;",
    lapply(sort(unique(dengue_clean$district)), htmltools::tags$li)
  )
)
```
